title: Machine Learning - Week 1 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 1 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master Python programming fundamentals and data loading workflows.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Python data structures
  • pandas dataframes
  • NumPy array math.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Python Data Cleaning CLI tool

Write a python script that loads local dataset files, imputes missing records, and saves clean files.

Deliverables

  • Public GitHub Repository URL & Live Streamlit / Demo URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Jupyter notebook with visual charts.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Solid skills in Python data cleaning and processing libraries.

title: Machine Learning - Week 2 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 2 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to understand data preprocessing, normalization, and categorical scaling.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • One-Hot Encoding
  • Standard Scaler
  • MinMax scaling
  • Feature engineering.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Feature Scaling Engine

Build a preprocessing pipeline preparing dataset matrices for ML model inputs.

Deliverables

  • Public GitHub Repository URL & Live Streamlit / Demo URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Python scripts with scaler modules.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Familiarity with data formatting pipelines.

title: Machine Learning - Week 3 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 3 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master Supervised Regression models and evaluation metrics.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Linear Regression
  • Ridge and Lasso regularization
  • Mean Squared Error (MSE)
  • R2 Score.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Housing Price Estimator Model

Train a regression model predicting housing prices based on scaled data columns.

Deliverables

  • Public GitHub Repository URL & Live Streamlit / Demo URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Regression metrics reports and coefficient charts.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Understand regression mechanics and evaluation indices.

title: Machine Learning - Week 4 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 4 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master Supervised Classification models.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Logistic Regression
  • Decision Trees
  • Confusion Matrix
  • Precision/Recall curve.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Customer Churn Predictor

Develop a classifier mapping churn rates using demographic customer data.

Deliverables

  • Public GitHub Repository URL & Live Streamlit / Demo URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Confusion matrix visual dashboard logs.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Ability to build classification architectures and analyze trade-offs.

title: Machine Learning - Week 5 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 5 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to learn ensemble learning models and hyperparameter tuning.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Random Forest
  • Gradient Boosting
  • GridSearchCV
  • cross-validation.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Optimized Crop Yield Classifier

Train Random Forest models tuning hyperparameters automatically via GridSearchCV.

Deliverables

  • Public GitHub Repository URL & Live Streamlit / Demo URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Grid search logs and parameter ranking.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Expertise in tuning model accuracy configurations.

title: Machine Learning - Week 6 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 6 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to learn unsupervised cluster grouping models.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • K-Means clustering
  • Principal Component Analysis (PCA)
  • Elbow method.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Customer Segments Aggregation

Implement K-means clustering grouping customers by spending behaviors, reducing columns with PCA.

Deliverables

  • Public GitHub Repository URL & Live Streamlit / Demo URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Cluster visualization graphs.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Ability to detect patterns in unlabeled datasets.

title: Machine Learning - Week 7 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 7 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to understand Natural Language Processing (NLP) text processing.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Tokenization
  • Stopwords filtering
  • TF-IDF vectors
  • NLTK text processing.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Movie Reviews Sentiment Analyzer

Create a classification pipeline parsing movie reviews and classifying sentiment.

Deliverables

  • Public GitHub Repository URL & Live Streamlit / Demo URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • NLP model files and sentiment test scripts.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Competence in text pre-processing and document classifications.

title: Machine Learning - Week 8 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 8 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to learn basic deep learning neural networks.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP)
  • Backpropagation algorithms
  • PyTorch/TensorFlow frameworks.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Handwritten Digits Classifier

Train a neural network classifying MNIST handwritten digit images.

Deliverables

  • Public GitHub Repository URL & Live Streamlit / Demo URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Neural network architecture files and training logs.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Understand neural network training cycles.
